title.en: The HRCP PHY: Two Radios in the 60 GHz Band (Clause 13)
title.zh: HRCP 物理层：60 GHz 频段里的两套无线电（第 13 章）

blocks.en: Clause 13 specifies the physical layer (PHY — the lowest layer of the radio that turns bits into actual waveforms) for HRCP, the High-Rate Close Proximity mode of 802.15.3. It lives in the millimeter-wave band around 60 GHz, where huge swaths of spectrum let devices push multi-gigabit data over short, line-of-sight links. A compliant HRCP PHY must implement at least one of two flavours: the high-rate single-carrier PHY (HRCP-SC PHY) of 13.2, or the on-off-keying PHY (HRCP-OOK PHY) of 13.3 (13.1.1). Think of them as two engines in the same chassis: one tuned for raw speed, the other for low cost and low power.
blocks.zh: 第 13 章规定了 HRCP 的物理层（PHY —— 无线电最底层，负责把比特变成真实波形）。HRCP 即 802.15.3 的“高速近距”模式，工作在 60 GHz 附近的毫米波频段，那里有大片可用频谱，使设备能在短距、视距链路上传输数 Gb/s 数据。合规的 HRCP PHY 必须至少实现两种之一：13.2 的高速单载波 PHY（HRCP-SC PHY），或 13.3 的开关键控 PHY（HRCP-OOK PHY）（13.1.1）。可以把它们看作同一底盘上的两台发动机：一台追求极致速度，另一台追求低成本、低功耗。

blocks.en: Before splitting into the two PHYs, 13.1 lays down the rules both must obey. RF power is always measured as EIRP (effective isotropic radiated power) and corrected for antenna gain (13.1.3); transmissions must respect the in-band and out-of-band emission limits of the local regulator (13.1.2, 13.1.4). Channelization (13.1.5) defines 16 channel IDs from 57.24 GHz to 70.2 GHz: IDs 1–6 are single 2.16 GHz channels (ID 2 at 60.48 GHz is the default), while IDs 7–16 are wider bonded or aggregated channels. Every transmitter must fit under a transmit power spectral density (PSD) mask (13.1.6) — a template that caps how much energy may spill into neighbouring frequencies — and modulation accuracy is judged by error vector magnitude (EVM), computed the same way as the THz PHY (13.1.7).
blocks.zh: 在分成两套 PHY 之前，13.1 先定下两者都必须遵守的规则。射频功率一律以 EIRP（等效全向辐射功率）测量，并按天线增益修正（13.1.3）；发射必须满足本地监管机构的带内与带外发射限值（13.1.2、13.1.4）。信道划分（13.1.5）定义了从 57.24 GHz 到 70.2 GHz 的 16 个信道编号：编号 1–6 为单个 2.16 GHz 信道（编号 2 位于 60.48 GHz，为默认信道），编号 7–16 则是更宽的绑定或聚合信道。每个发射机都必须落在发射功率谱密度（PSD）模板之下（13.1.6）—— 该模板限定可溢出到相邻频率的能量—— 调制精度则用误差矢量幅度（EVM）衡量，计算方式与太赫兹 PHY 相同（13.1.7）。

blocks.en: Acronyms to keep handy: PHY = physical layer; SC = single carrier; OOK = on-off keying (the simplest digital modulation: signal on = 1, signal off = 0); MCS = modulation and coding scheme (a numbered recipe pairing a constellation with an error-correction rate); FEC = forward error correction (parity bits added so the receiver can fix errors without retransmission); LDPC = low-density parity-check code; RS = Reed–Solomon code; DEV = a device; PRC = the pairnet coordinator. A 'pairnet' is HRCP's tiny short-range network.
blocks.zh: 随手记的缩写：PHY = 物理层；SC = 单载波；OOK = 开关键控（最简单的数字调制：有信号=1，无信号=0）；MCS = 调制与编码方案（一个编号配方，把星座图与纠错码率配对）；FEC = 前向纠错（加入校验位，使接收端无需重传即可纠错）；LDPC = 低密度奇偶校验码；RS = 里德-所罗门码；DEV = 设备；PRC = pairnet 协调器。“pairnet” 是 HRCP 的微型近距网络。

blocks.en: The HRCP-SC PHY (13.2) is the speed engine: it targets single-channel payload rates of 2–13 Gb/s and, with MIMO plus channel bonding and aggregation, up to 100 Gb/s (13.2.1). It carries the preamble and header in π/2-BPSK (a rotated binary phase modulation), and the payload in π/2-QPSK, 16-QAM, 64-QAM, or 256-QAM — richer constellations packing more bits per symbol. π/2-BPSK and π/2-QPSK are mandatory; the rest are optional. Two rate-compatible LDPC codes (rate 14/15 and 11/15) provide mandatory error correction. Channelization (13.2.2) reuses the 16 IDs of Table 13-1, picking single channels (1–6) or bonded/aggregated channels (7–16).
blocks.zh: HRCP-SC PHY（13.2）是速度发动机：单信道目标负载速率 2–13 Gb/s，配合 MIMO 加信道绑定与聚合，最高可达 100 Gb/s（13.2.1）。它用 π/2-BPSK（一种旋转的二进制相位调制）承载前导与帧头，用 π/2-QPSK、16-QAM、64-QAM 或 256-QAM 承载负载—— 星座越丰富，每符号承载的比特越多。π/2-BPSK 与 π/2-QPSK 为强制，其余可选。两个速率兼容的 LDPC 码（码率 14/15 与 11/15）提供强制纠错。信道划分（13.2.2）复用表 13-1 的 16 个编号，可选单信道（1–6）或绑定/聚合信道（7–16）。

blocks.en: How does the SC PHY actually shape a frame? Modulation and coding (13.2.3) ties together MCS-dependent parameters (the 7-entry table of constellation + FEC rate + data rate), header-rate parameters, timing (chip rate 1760 MHz per bonded channel, 64-chip blocks), and frame parameters. The encoder LDPC-codes the scrambled MAC body, adds 'stuff bits' to fill out the final block, spreads the header, and maps everything to the constellation. The frame itself (13.2.4) begins with a PHY preamble — SYNC (28 or 14 repeats of a 128-chip Golay sequence for detection), SFD (start-frame delimiter for timing), and CES (channel-estimation sequence) — then a frame header carrying the MCS, scrambler seed, and frame length protected by a CRC-16 header check sequence (HCS) and an extended Hamming FEC, then the payload field built from 64-chip blocks with optional 8-chip pilot words and periodically inserted PPRE (pilot preamble) re-sync bursts (13.2.4.5).
blocks.zh: SC PHY 究竟如何成帧？调制与编码（13.2.3）把 MCS 相关参数（7 行表，含星座+FEC 码率+数据速率）、帧头速率参数、定时参数（每绑定信道 1760 MHz 码片速率，64 码片为一块）与帧参数串联起来。编码器对加扰后的 MAC 帧体做 LDPC 编码，加入“填充位”补齐最后一块，对帧头做扩频，并将一切映射到星座。帧本身（13.2.4）以 PHY 前导开始——SYNC（用于检测，重复 28 或 14 次 128 码片的 Golay 序列）、SFD（帧起始定界符，用于定时）、CES（信道估计序列）——随后是帧头，承载 MCS、加扰种子、帧长，由 CRC-16 帧头校验序列（HCS）与扩展汉明 FEC 保护，再是由 64 码片块构成的负载字段，含可选 8 码片导频字与周期性插入的 PPRE（导频前导）重同步串（13.2.4.5）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 640 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="6" y="30" width="70" height="34"/><text x="41" y="51" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">SYNC</text><rect x="76" y="30" width="46" height="34"/><text x="99" y="51" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">SFD</text><rect x="122" y="30" width="46" height="34"/><text x="145" y="51" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">CES</text><text x="87" y="22" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">PHY preamble</text><rect x="168" y="30" width="150" height="34"/><text x="243" y="48" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Frame header</text><text x="243" y="60" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">PHY+MAC, HCS, FEC</text><rect x="318" y="30" width="316" height="34"/><text x="476" y="48" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">PHY Payload field</text><text x="476" y="60" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9" text-anchor="middle">blocks + pilot words + PPRE</text></svg>

caption.en: The HRCP-SC PHY frame strip: preamble (SYNC / SFD / CES) for acquisition, a FEC-protected frame header, then the block-structured payload with optional pilot words and periodic PPRE re-sync.
caption.zh: HRCP-SC PHY 帧结构：用于捕获的前导（SYNC / SFD / CES）、受 FEC 保护的帧头，随后是分块的负载，含可选导频字与周期性 PPRE 重同步。

blocks.en: The remaining SC subclauses pin down conformance and the high-end mode. Transmitter specs (13.2.5) set the maximum EVM per MCS (–12 dB up to –36 dB), a ±30 ppm center-frequency tolerance, the symbol/chip rate accuracy, and a sub-9.3 ns power-on/down ramp. Receiver specs (13.2.6) require a frame-error rate (FER) under 8% at a 214-octet payload, list reference sensitivities per MCS (down to –61 dBm), and demand at least –30 dBm maximum input. PHY timing (13.2.7) defines the inter-frame space (IFS), receive-to-transmit and transmit-to-receive turnaround, time between transmissions, and a 100 µs channel-switch limit. PHY management (13.2.8) caps the frame body at 2 099 200 octets and the transfer unit at 2 097 152 octets with a 2048-octet minimum fragment. Finally 13.2.9 introduces MIMO (2×2 up to 16×16 spatial streams), channel aggregation/bonding, and the Beacon-driven array-training link-setup that selects antenna elements before the high-rate exchange begins.
blocks.zh: SC 的其余子条款锁定一致性要求与高端模式。发射机规格（13.2.5）规定每种 MCS 的最大 EVM（‒12 dB 至 ‒36 dB）、±30 ppm 中心频率容差、符号/码片速率精度，以及小于 9.3 ns 的功率上升/下降斜坡。接收机规格（13.2.6）要求在 214 字节负载下帧错误率（FER）低于 8%，按 MCS 列出参考灵敏度（低至 ‒61 dBm），并要求最大输入至少 ‒30 dBm。PHY 定时（13.2.7）定义帧间隔（IFS）、收发与发收转换时间、两次发送之间的时间，以及 100 µs 的信道切换上限。PHY 管理（13.2.8）将帧体上限定为 2 099 200 字节、传输单元为 2 097 152 字节、最小分片 2048 字节。最后 13.2.9 引入 MIMO（2×2 至 16×16 空间流）、信道聚合/绑定，以及由 Beacon 驱动的阵列训练链路建立——在高速交换开始前先选定天线阵元。

blocks.en: The HRCP-OOK PHY (13.3) is the thrifty engine, built for cost-effective, low-power, simple devices (13.3.1). It uses a single modulation (OOK) and a single FEC family (Reed–Solomon), no MIMO and no channel aggregation — but it does support channel bonding of up to four adjacent channels for more throughput (13.3.2). Bonding only the contiguous IDs 2/8/12/15 widens the band and raises the chip rate (1760 MHz for one channel up to 7040 MHz for four), reusing the same PSD masks as the SC PHY (13.3.2.3). Modulation and coding (13.3.3) defines four modes (one per bonding width), the RS(240,224) mother code with shortened variants, OOK signalling where a '1' is signal-present and a '0' signal-absent, two spreading methods (an LFSR-driven PRBS for the header, simple bit-repetition for the payload), and the scrambler.
blocks.zh: HRCP-OOK PHY（13.3）是省钱发动机，面向低成本、低功耗、设计简单的设备（13.3.1）。它只用一种调制（OOK）和一族 FEC（里德-所罗门），不支持 MIMO 与信道聚合——但确实支持最多四个相邻信道的绑定以提升吞吐（13.3.2）。仅绑定连续编号 2/8/12/15 即可拓宽频带、提高码片速率（单信道 1760 MHz，四信道达 7040 MHz），并复用与 SC PHY 相同的 PSD 模板（13.3.2.3）。调制与编码（13.3.3）定义四种模式（每种绑定宽度一种）、母码 RS(240,224) 及其缩短变体、OOK 信令（“1” 为有信号、“0” 为无信号）、两种扩频方法（帧头用 LFSR 驱动的 PRBS，负载用简单比特重复）以及加扰器。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  A[MAC frame body] --> B[Scramble]
  B --> C[RS 240,224 encode]
  C --> D[Stuff bits]
  D --> E[Bit-repeat if LSF=2]
  E --> F[OOK map]
  F --> G[Build blocks + pilots]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  A[MAC 帧体] --> B[加扰]
  B --> C[RS 240,224 编码]
  C --> D[填充位]
  D --> E[LSF=2 时比特重复]
  E --> F[OOK 映射]
  F --> G[成块 + 导频]

blocks.en: The OOK frame format (13.3.4) mirrors the SC layout but is OOK-friendly. The preamble (SYNC/SFD/CES) is OOK-modulated; cleverly, the SFD's four Golay codes double as a signalling field that tells the receiver the number of bonded channels and the spreading factor, and whether a CES follows (13.3.4.2). When bonding is used, each preamble subfield is simply repeated per channel so its duration stays constant. The frame header (13.3.4.3) carries a scrambler seed, an aggregation flag, frame length, and a pilot-symbol flag, protected by an ITU-T CRC-16 HCS and a shortened RS header FEC. The payload (13.3.4.4) is scrambled, RS-encoded in 224-octet blocks, stuffed, optionally bit-repeated, OOK-mapped, and split into blocks with optional pilot symbols that also act as a cyclic prefix enabling frequency-domain equalization.
blocks.zh: OOK 帧格式（13.3.4）与 SC 布局相仿，但更贴合 OOK。前导（SYNC/SFD/CES）以 OOK 调制；巧妙之处在于 SFD 的四个 Golay 码兼作信令字段，告诉接收端绑定信道数、扩频因子，以及其后是否跟随 CES（13.3.4.2）。使用绑定时，前导各子字段按信道数简单重复，使其时长保持不变。帧头（13.3.4.3）承载加扰种子、聚合标志、帧长与导频符号标志，由 ITU-T CRC-16 HCS 与缩短 RS 帧头 FEC 保护。负载（13.3.4.4）经加扰、按 224 字节块做 RS 编码、填充、可选比特重复、OOK 映射，再切分为块，并含可选导频符号——这些导频还兼作循环前缀，使频域均衡成为可能。

blocks.en: The OOK PHY closes with the same conformance triad as the SC PHY. Transmitter specs (13.3.5) describe modulation quality via an OOK eye-opening criterion (Annex G.7) rather than EVM, plus ±30 ppm center-frequency and symbol-rate tolerances. Receiver specs (13.3.6) again require FER under 8% at a 214-octet payload, list per-mode reference sensitivities (down to –59 dBm), and set the maximum input level at –10 dBm. PHY timing (13.3.7) defines OOK's IFS, the two turnaround times, time between transmissions, and the 100 µs channel-switch limit. PHY management (13.3.8) keeps the same 2 099 200-octet frame body and 2 097 152-octet transfer unit, but — reflecting its lighter touch — sets the minimum fragment to just 512 octets versus the SC PHY's 2048.
blocks.zh: OOK PHY 以与 SC PHY 相同的一致性三件套收尾。发射机规格（13.3.5）用 OOK 眼图张开度准则（附录 G.7）而非 EVM 描述调制质量，并规定 ±30 ppm 的中心频率与符号速率容差。接收机规格（13.3.6）同样要求 214 字节负载下 FER 低于 8%，按模式列出参考灵敏度（低至 ‒59 dBm），并将最大输入电平设为 ‒10 dBm。PHY 定时（13.3.7）定义 OOK 的 IFS、两种转换时间、两次发送间隔与 100 µs 信道切换上限。PHY 管理（13.3.8）保持相同的 2 099 200 字节帧体与 2 097 152 字节传输单元，但——体现其轻量定位——将最小分片设为仅 512 字节，而 SC PHY 为 2048 字节。

summary.en: Coverage map: every 13.x clause and its page
summary.zh: 覆盖图：每个 13.x 条款及其页码

blocks.en: 13.1 General requirements — 13.1.1 Overview (two PHY modes); 13.1.2 Regulatory info (same band as THz PHY); 13.1.3 RF power measured as EIRP, antenna-gain corrected; 13.1.4 Unwanted emissions per regulator; 13.1.5 RF channelization (Table 13-1, 16 CHNL_IDs, ID 2 default); 13.1.6 Transmit PSD mask (single channel + bonding); 13.1.7 EVM calculation (per 12.1.8.1); 13.1.8 HRCP-PHY management (supported MCSs in DEV capabilities; PHY PIB Tables 13-4/13-5). — 13.2 HRCP-SC PHY: 13.2.1 General (2–13 Gb/s, up to 100 Gb/s; mandatory π/2-BPSK/QPSK + LDPC 14/15 & 11/15); 13.2.2 Channelization; 13.2.3 Modulation & coding (MCS/header/timing/frame params, modulation, LDPC FEC, stuff bits, spreading, scrambling); 13.2.4 Frame format (preamble SYNC/SFD/CES, header + HCS + Hamming FEC, payload, pilot words & PPRE); 13.2.5 Transmitter specs (EVM, freq tolerance, symbol rate, power ramp); 13.2.6 Receiver specs (FER criterion, sensitivity, max input); 13.2.7 PHY timing (IFS, turnarounds, time between Tx, channel switch); 13.2.8 PHY management (max frame/transfer/fragment sizes); 13.2.9 MIMO + bonding + aggregation (2×2–16×16, link setup, array training, MIMO preamble/header/payload, transmitter/receiver specs). — 13.3 HRCP-OOK PHY: 13.3.1 General (low-cost, OOK + RS, bonding only); 13.3.2 Channel bonding (general, channelization IDs 2/8/12/15, PSD mask); 13.3.3 Modulation & coding (MCS modes, header params, timing, frame params, OOK modulation & signal description, RS FEC, code spreading via LFSR PRBS, scrambling); 13.3.4 Frame format (preamble with SFD-coded MCS, header + CRC-16 HCS + RS FEC, payload + pilot symbols); 13.3.5 Transmitter specs (eye opening, freq tolerance, symbol rate); 13.3.6 Receiver specs (FER, sensitivity, max input); 13.3.7 PHY timing (IFS, turnarounds, time between Tx, channel switch); 13.3.8 PHY management (max frame 2 099 200 / transfer 2 097 152 / min fragment 512 octets).
blocks.zh: 13.1 通用要求 — 13.1.1 概述（两种 PHY 模式）；13.1.2 监管信息（与太赫兹 PHY 同频段）；13.1.3 射频功率按 EIRP 测量并修正天线增益；13.1.4 按监管要求的杂散发射；13.1.5 射频信道划分（表 13-1，16 个 CHNL_ID，编号 2 默认）；13.1.6 发射 PSD 模板（单信道+绑定）；13.1.7 EVM 计算（按 12.1.8.1）；13.1.8 HRCP-PHY 管理（DEV 能力中的支持 MCS；PHY PIB 表 13-4/13-5）。— 13.2 HRCP-SC PHY：13.2.1 概述（2–13 Gb/s，最高 100 Gb/s；强制 π/2-BPSK/QPSK 与 LDPC 14/15 及 11/15）；13.2.2 信道划分；13.2.3 调制与编码（MCS/帧头/定时/帧参数、调制、LDPC FEC、填充位、扩频、加扰）；13.2.4 帧格式（前导 SYNC/SFD/CES、帧头+HCS+汉明 FEC、负载、导频字与 PPRE）；13.2.5 发射机规格（EVM、频率容差、符号速率、功率斜坡）；13.2.6 接收机规格（FER 准则、灵敏度、最大输入）；13.2.7 PHY 定时（IFS、转换时间、发送间隔、信道切换）；13.2.8 PHY 管理（最大帧/传输/分片尺寸）；13.2.9 MIMO+绑定+聚合（2×2–16×16、链路建立、阵列训练、MIMO 前导/帧头/负载、收发规格）。— 13.3 HRCP-OOK PHY：13.3.1 概述（低成本、OOK+RS、仅绑定）；13.3.2 信道绑定（总则、信道划分编号 2/8/12/15、PSD 模板）；13.3.3 调制与编码（MCS 模式、帧头参数、定时、帧参数、OOK 调制与信号描述、RS FEC、LFSR PRBS 扩频、加扰）；13.3.4 帧格式（SFD 编码 MCS 的前导、帧头+CRC-16 HCS+RS FEC、负载+导频符号）；13.3.5 发射机规格（眼图张开、频率容差、符号速率）；13.3.6 接收机规格（FER、灵敏度、最大输入）；13.3.7 PHY 定时（IFS、转换时间、发送间隔、信道切换）；13.3.8 PHY 管理（最大帧 2 099 200 / 传输 2 097 152 / 最小分片 512 字节）。

cites.note: 13.1 general requirements (overview, regulatory, RF power, emissions, channelization, PSD mask, EVM, PHY management/PIB) and 13.2.1-13.2.3 SC PHY general, channelization, modulation/coding.
13.2.4 SC frame format (preamble/header/payload/pilot/PPRE), 13.2.5-13.2.8 transmitter/receiver specs, timing, management, and 13.2.9 MIMO/bonding/aggregation.
13.3 HRCP-OOK PHY: general, channel bonding, modulation/coding (OOK, RS FEC, spreading, scrambling), frame format, transmitter/receiver specs, PHY timing, PHY management.
